_description: Naive cascade (small) — two identical U-Nets [32,64,128,256] ~7.7M each, ~15M total. Stage 1 is trained with frozen Stage-0 output (detach). Tests whether a second U-Net trained on Stage-0 residuals adds anything when stages are fully independent. Compared against the small single U-Net baseline to isolate the effect of adding a naive refinement stage; compared against the large naive cascade to rule out capacity as the reason for any failure.
